completedorder.description: The table records financial transactions, detailing each order by its unique ID, the account ID from which the payment is made, the bank and account number to which the payment is sent, the amount of the transaction, and the type of payment indicated by the k_symbol (e.g., Household Payment, Loan Payment).

CRM_Events.description: This table contains records of consumer complaints related to financial products and services, detailing the type of product, specific issues, how the complaint was submitted, the company's response, and whether the response was timely or disputed, along with unique identifiers for each complaint and client.

completeddisposition.description: The table lists various disposition IDs (disp_id) along with associated client IDs (client_id) and account IDs (account_id), specifying the role (type) of each client with respect to the account, such as 'Owner' or 'User'.

completedcard.description: The table records details of VISA Signature card transactions, including a unique card identifier (card_id), an associated display identifier (disp_id), the card type, and the date of the transaction broken down by year, month, and day, as well as a full date format.

LuxuryLoanPortfolio.description: The table contains detailed information on loans, including unique identifiers (loan_id), funded amounts, funding dates, loan durations in years and months, treasury index rates at funding, interest rates in percent and decimal, monthly payments, total past payments, remaining loan balances, property values, and the purpose of the loan. It also includes personal borrower information such as names, social security numbers, phone numbers, job titles, employment lengths, and property details like building class, tax class, addresses, city, state, number of units, land and gross square footage, and tax class at the time of sale.

CRM_Call_Center_Logs.description: This table records details of customer service calls, including the date received, complaint ID, client identifier, phone number, VRU line, call ID, priority level, type, outcome, server name, service start and exit times, and total service time.

completedloan.description: This table lists loan transactions, including unique identifiers for loans (loan_id) and accounts (account_id), the loan amount, duration in months, monthly payment amounts, loan status, the year, month, and day of the loan issuance, the full date in a YYYY-MM-DD format, the location code, and the purpose of the loan (e.g., car purchase).

completeddistrict.description: The table lists various districts, each identified by a unique ID, along with their corresponding city, state name, state abbreviation, region, and division within the United States.

completedtrans.description: This table records banking transactions, including transaction IDs, account IDs, type of transaction, operation performed, amount transacted, account balance after the transaction, and the date and time of the transaction in various formats. Each row represents a credit transaction made in cash, with additional columns for year, month, and day extracted from the full date.

CRM_Reviews.description: This table contains customer reviews for Eagle National Mortgage, including the date of the review, the star rating given (out of 5), the content of the review, the specific product mentioned, and the district ID associated with the transaction.

completedacct.description: The table lists records of monthly account issuances, including the account ID, district ID, issuance frequency, and the parsed date of issuance broken down into year, month, and day.

completedclient.description: The table contains personal and contact information for clients, including client ID, sex, date of birth (with separate columns for day, month, and year), age, social security number, full name (first, middle, last), phone number, email address, residential address (with address line 1 and 2), city, state, zipcode, and district ID.
